mapper.select: SELECT W.ID AS id, W.WORDS_TITLE AS wordsTitle, W.WORDS_DETAIL AS wordsDetail, W.WORDS_IMAGE AS wordsImage, W.WORDS_TYPE AS wordsType, W.EDU_VIDEO_ID AS eduVideoId FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP EWM JOIN TBL_WORDS W ON EWM.WORDS_ID = W.ID WHERE EWM.EDU_ID = #{eduId} ORDER BY EWM.ID ASC
SELECT ID AS id, WORDS_TITLE AS wordsTitle, WORDS_DETAIL AS wordsDetail, WORDS_IMAGE AS wordsImage, WORDS_TYPE AS wordsType, EDU_VIDEO_ID AS eduVideoId FROM TBL_WORDS WHERE ID = #{id}
